summary: Iter6 - tested ANIA Mapping (Garanzie/Operatori) CRUD + applica-a-polizze, Contabilita Statistiche endpoint and tab, PolizzaDetail edit dialog with new economic fields (premio_tasse/imposte/ssn) and Modifica/Elimina buttons. 7/7 backend tests PASS. All required frontend data-testids verified.

design_issues.screen: Mapping dialogs / Edit polizza dialog / Apply confirm dialog
issues: Console a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on Radix DialogContent in MappingGaranziaForm, MappingOperatoreForm, EditPolizzaDialog - non-blocking, repeat of iter5 finding

action_items: (Low priority) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to MappingGaranziaForm, MappingOperatoreForm, EditPolizzaDialog and the 'Applica a polizze' confirm AlertDialog to silence Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/librerie/mapping-garanzie and /mapping-operatori correctly enforce admin role and 400 on missing codice_ania.
GET /api/librerie/mapping-operatori enriches each item with user object (name, email, role) - confirmed working.
/api/librerie/mapping-operatori/applica-a-polizze correctly sets collaboratore_id on polizze whose operatore_ania_codice matches mapping (verified polizze_aggiornate>=1 in test).
/api/librerie/mapping-garanzie/applica-a-polizze correctly renames garanzia.garanzia using nome_personalizzato by codice_ania match (case-insensitive via upper()).

/api/contabilita/statistiche returns full shape (kpi, saldi_conti, saldi_compagnie, sum_conti, crediti_attivi, liquidita_disponibile, liquidita_postera) and math checks pass: liquidita_postera == sum_conti - saldo_cassa_compagnie; liquidita_disponibile == sum_conti - crediti_attivi - saldo_cassa_compagnie.
Polizza PUT persists premio_netto/premio_tasse/premio_imposte/premio_ssn/premio_lordo/operatore_ania_codice (verified via Create→PUT→GET pattern).
Polizza Pydantic model uses 'effetto' / 'scadenza' field names (not 'data_effetto'/'data_scadenza') - frontend forms should use the same.

data-testid 'stat-kpi' is intentionally on the container wrapping 7 KPI cards (1 element holding 7 children); 'stat-liquidita' is on the 2-card container. This is by design; UI screenshot confirms all 7 KPIs render correctly.
data-testid 'edit-pol-numero' lives on the Anagrafica tab of EditPolizzaDialog; not visible from Economici tab (Radix Tabs unmounts inactive). Confirmed present at PolizzaDetail.jsx:364.
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary mapping_garanzie, mapping_operatori entries and Polizze prefixed 'TST-'/'TEST-' and clean up via DELETE in the same test class. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iter6_mapping_stats.py cover Mapping (Garanzie + Operatori) CRUD, both applica-a-polizze endpoints, statistiche shape + math + period filter, and Polizza PUT for new economic fields. IMPORTANT: Polizza model fields are 'effetto'/'scadenza' (not 'data_*'). Users endpoint is /api/auth/users (not /api/users). Anagrafiche endpoint is /api/anagrafiche (not /api/clienti). Stat KPI testids are container-level (stat-kpi, stat-liquidita) not per-card.
rca of the issue: N/A - no production bugs found. Initial test failures were due to incorrect endpoint paths and Polizza field names in the test script, all corrected.
